title: linaria reflexa subsp. gangitis
intro: Linaria reflexa subsp. gangitis, also known as the gangitis linaria, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the family Plantaginaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and protect against infections. The herbal preparations of Linaria reflexa subsp. gangitis typically include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
